A prototype roadmap is outlined, highlighting material selection, hardware integration, and performance trade‑offs between brightness, DOF, and peripheral vision. This concept demonstrates a feasible pathway toward adaptive optics in wearable vision technology.

Disabling or removing `{{chat_history}}` from the template, disabling memory, or switching off agentic mode stops this behavior, ensuring each query reflects only the latest user request.
